_comment: Configuration for the CACC Real Quantum desktop automation agent.
_comment2: Real Quantum is a web-based SaaS app. This agent attaches to an existing Chrome session via Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP).
_comment_cdp: CDP URL for the Chrome remote debugging port. Launch Chrome with: chrome.exe --remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir=C:\rq-session
_comment_rq: Base URL of Real Quantum. Used to identify the correct browser tab.
_comment_browser: Browser to use. 'chromium' works with both Chrome and Chromium. Change to 'chrome' if needed.
_comment_nav: Timeout in milliseconds for waiting on navigation selectors to appear.
_comment_verify: verify_insertion reads the field back after insert to confirm success. Disable if it causes slowness.
_comment_screenshot: screenshot_on_failure saves a PNG to real_quantum_agent/screenshots/ on insertion failure. Useful for debugging selector issues.
_comment_setup: FIRST-TIME SETUP: 1) Launch Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222, 2) Log into Real Quantum, 3) Open your commercial report, 4) Run python real_quantum_agent/agent.py
_comment_selectors: To discover the correct CSS selectors for each field, call GET http://localhost:5181/list-sections while your report is open. Update field_maps/commercial.json with the results.
